characters.name: Alyson Malitski
characters.description: Gender: Female Age: Alyson is introduced as a sweet, bubbly, feminine, and laid-back teenager. While Alyson is mostly seen at Nina's side for the first two seasons of the series, she's rarely viewed as the type to be just as cruel or mean like the latter. This is mainly because she's onlyseenin having to participate on doing whatever her so-called "friend" asks, to ensure that her rival's life is as miserable as possible. Because she never got to speak up for herself, due to Nina being the cause, she remains as the reclusive sidekick that gets bossed around. However, as soon as when she finally became fed up with Nina and her rude ways, as well as the fact that the latter didn't seem to care for her at all, seeing that being around Sharon and her group of friends made her realize that she can always be herself and not act like someone's doormat to be stepped on,. She finally stood up for herself against Nina and broke off the friendship, seeing that she's foundrealfriends who care for her. Since becoming part of Sharon's friend group, as well as the girlfriend ofConnor, Alyson retains her sweet and bubbly persona. It is also worth mentioning that Alyson is not your typical, ditzy teenager. An example being one where she has said that people would tend to call her "shallow", due to the simple fact she utters the word "totally" a lot. This is seen in "Pegged". Hence her remark "I'm atotallywell-rounded person".

characters.name: Cody
characters.description: CodyGender:MaleAge:Late High SchoolHair color:RedEye color:BrownRelatives:No informationLove Interests:No informationFriends:Sharon Spitz(formerly)Enemies:No informationCodyis a guy inVegging Out, he becomes friends withSharon Spitz. He did not respect her vegetarianism and went far as tricking her into eating a hot dog made of meat.

characters.name: David
characters.description: DavidGender:MaleAge:UnknownHair color:BrownEye color:BrownRelatives:Lara and Sara(daughters)Love Interests:Helen SpitzFriends:UnknownEnemies:Unknown Davidis the name of the man Helen Spitz is currently dating. He has twin daughters from a previous relationship, and Sharon has babysat his daughters from time to time. Sharon and her brothersdolike David, although Sharon has admitted she thinks he is kind of "dorky."

characters.name: Leena
characters.description: Gender: Female Age: According to Jill, Leena was not particularly tidy, as her side of the room was always messy. However, she was hard working in wanting to achieve her goal of being a famous singer although she does express missing the every day normalcy she had before her career. During rehearsal for a music video, she shows frustration at having to follow so many rules and restrictions but does not want to jeopardized her career and will push herself to near fainting caused by exhaustion and hunger. Leena also proves that she is much kinder than numerous tabloids claim. Stories portray her as a demanding and easily angered diva but she is actually much nicer and generous and still does many things like she had before becoming a star.
